item.name: Magicked Card
item.description: Crafted by the realm's foremost goldsmith, this enchanted ridable Triple Triad card will take you wonder by wonder, over, sideways, and under.

mount.name: Magicked Card
mount.action: Summon forth your magicked card to take you wonder by wonder, over, sideways, and under.
mount.description: Crafted by Eorzea's foremost goldsmith, Godbert Manderville, this enchanted card is awarded to those who have collected an unprecedented number of Triple Triad cards. May it bear you through endless diamond skies, to dazzling places you never knew, and show you new fantastic points of view.
mount.tooltip:
Fancy a game of cards?
- Iola

obj.n: The Adventurer with All the Cards
